  "decision": "needs_more_info",

  "findings": [
    "Submittal missing product listing page and critical project note.",
    "Shortcut proposed without documented approval could violate NEC 110.2 and 110.3(B) regarding listed/labeled equipment and installation per instructions.",
    "Working clearances per NEC 110.26 may be compromised if the shortcut alters panelboard placement or accessibility.",
    "Neutral conductor identification per NEC 200.4 could be affected depending on the nature of the shortcut."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on the proposed shortcut until missing submittal documentation is obtained and reviewed.",
    "Require the crew to provide the complete submittal including the product listing page and the referenced project note.",
    "Verify that the shortcut does not conflict with manufacturer's installation instructions, listing requirements, or NEC working clearances.",
    "Document the hold point and notify the general contractor and electrical inspector of the pending review."
  ],
  "rationale": "Without the product listing page, the installation cannot be verified as compliant with NEC 110.3(B) (installation per listing/labeling) or the approved submittal. The missing project note is essential to determine if the shortcut was previously evaluated and rejected/accepted. Proceeding without this information risks creating a non-compliant and potentially unsafe installation that would fail inspection and require rework.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.2",
    "NEC 110.3(B)",
    "NEC 110.26",
    "NEC 200.4",
    "NEC 408"
  ]
}
